Index: bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,128 @@
+# Routing Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/hono.ts
+- Purpose: Main Hono class entry point that extends HonoBase and sets up default routing with SmartRouter containing RegExpRouter and TrieRouter fallbacks
+- Names noticed: Hono, HonoBase, SmartRouter, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter, BlankEnv, BlankSchema, Env, Schema, HonoOptions, Router
+- Simple note: 34 lines, constructor sets default router to SmartRouter wrapping RegExpRouter then TrieRouter
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+- Purpose: Core base implementation with routing methods (get, post, put, delete, use, on), error handlers, not-found handlers, basePath, route, mount, fetch, request, fire
+- Names noticed: HonoBase, Hono, Router, Context, compose, Context, METHOD, METHODS, NotFoundHandler, ErrorHandler, FetchEventLike, Handler, HandlerInterface, MergePath, MergeSchemaPath, MiddlewareHandler, MiddlewareHandlerInterface, Next, Env, Schema, RouterRoute, getPath, getPathNoStrict, mergePath, COMPOSED_HANDLER, strict, basePath, on, onError, notFound, mount, route, addRoute, dispatch, request, fire
+- Simple note: 545 lines, implements full request lifecycle with router matching, error handling, middleware composition, and multiple HTTP method handlers
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Module index that exports PatternRouter class
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter, Router
+- Simple note: 6 lines, re-exports PatternRouter from router.ts
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Route matching using compiled regex patterns with support for named parameters and wildcards
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter, Router, Params, Result, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, Route, emptyParams
+- Simple note: 60 lines, transforms routes into regex patterns with named groups matching for parameter extraction
+
+## src/router/linear-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Module index that exports LinearRouter class
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter, Router
+- Simple note: 6 lines, re-exports LinearRouter from router.ts
+
+## src/router/linear-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Linear sequential route matching with support for wildcards, named parameters with optional regex patterns, and optional path segments
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter, Router, Params, Result, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, ROUTES_LOOP, RegExpMatchArrayWithIndices, splitPathRe, splitByStarRe, checkOptionalParameter, emptyParams, path, parts, pos, lastIndex, restPath, match, lookahead, name, params, hasStar, hasLabel, endsWithStar, value
+- Simple note: 144 lines, iterates through all registered routes linearly for matching, handles wildcards (*) and optional segments (?)
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Module index exporting RegExpRouter and PreparedRegExpRouter classes
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, PreparedRegExpRouter, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams, Router
+- Simple note: 7 lines, re-exports main router classes and preparation utilities from router.ts and prepared-router.ts
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Implements router that builds compiled regex matchers from registered routes using trie-based construction and caches for performance
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, Router, ParamIndexMap, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, checkOptionalParameter, HandlerData, StaticMap, Matcher, MatcherMap, HandlerWithMetadata, buildWildcardRegExp, clearWildcardRegExpCache, wildcardRegExpCache, buildMatcherFromPreprocessedRoutes, findMiddleware, emptyParam, Trie, PATH_ERROR, paramAssoc, paramCount, routes, staticMap, handlerData, handlerMap, indexReplacementMap, paramReplacementMap, matchers, hasOwnRoute, middleware, trie, regexp, paramIndexMap, pathErrorCheckOnly, isStaticA, pathA, isStaticB, pathB, i, j, len, route, method, match, m, keys, k, regexp, matcher, matchersMethod, matcherMethod, middlewareMethod, routeMethod, staticMatch, ownRoute, routesM, METHOD_NAME_ALL_LOWERCASE
+- Simple note: 252 lines, prebuilds regex matchers once, caches them in #routes and #middleware maps, uses trie to organize patterns and generate single combined regex
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts
+- Purpose: Core matching function that applies compiled regex matchers and parameter remapping for route resolution
+- Names noticed: ParamIndexMap, Result, Router, HandlerData, StaticMap, Matcher, MatcherMap, ParamStash, emptyParam, match, nullMatcher, buildAllMatchers
+- Simple note: 33 lines, uses compiled [regex, handlerData, staticMap] triples to match routes, returns matched handlers with parameter index remapping
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts
+- Purpose: Allows adding routes after all initial paths are known for static analysis and optimization
+- Names noticed: PreparedRegExpRouter, Router, MatcherMap, RelocateMap, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT, METHOD_NAME_ALL, emptyParam, staticMap, matcher, indexes, map, matcherM, all, handlerData, addWildcard, addPath, handler, path, indexes, handlerMap, relocateMap, paths, RegExpRouterWithMatcherExport, buildAndExportAllMatchers
+- Simple note: 165 lines, used for static route registration where all paths are known upfront, builds relocateMap for efficient handler insertion
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts
+- Purpose: Trie node implementation with recursive pattern insertion and regex string building for compiled route patterns
+- Names noted: Node, Context, ParamAssocArray, PATH_ERROR, LABEL_REG_EXP_STR, ONLY_WILDCARD_REG_EXP_STR, TAIL_WILDCARD_REG_EXP_STR, regExpMetaChars, compareKey, insert, buildRegExpStr, childKeys, strList, c, token, pattern, name, regexpStr, key, child, restTokens, paramMap
+- Simple note: 162 lines, builds trie tree with pattern tokens, assigns varIndex for parameters, generates regex strings with @varIndex markers and #index anchors
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts
+- Purpose: Trie container that manages multiple Node instances and builds the final compiled regex with replacement maps
+- Names noticed: Trie, Context, Node, ParamAssocArray, ReplacementMap
+- Simple note: 74 lines, wraps Node tree, processes group placeholders {:pattern}, builds regexp with #index and @param markers for remapping
+
+## src/router/smart-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Module index that exports SmartRouter class
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter, Router
+- Simple note: 6 lines, re-exports SmartRouter from router.ts
+
+## src/router/smart-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Fallback-first router that tries multiple routers sequentially and commits to first successful match, optimizing for common cases
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter, Router, Result, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT, UnsupportedPathError, activeRouter
+- Simple note: 70 lines, iterates through #routers array, delegates add/match, commits to first router that successfully matches, caches active router
+
+## src/router/trie-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Module index that exports TrieRouter class
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter, Router
+- Simple note: 6 lines, re-exports TrieRouter from router.ts
+
+## src/router/trie-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Trie-based route matching with method-specific path tree traversal for efficient lookups
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter, Router, Node, checkOptionalParameter, emptyParams, METHOD_NAME_ALL, HandlerSet, HandlerParamsSet, params, score, possibleKeys, patterns, curNode, parts, p, curNodes, j, nextNode, isLast, k, node, method, pattern, key, child, res, handlerSets
+- Simple note: 28 lines, delegates to Node.insert for adding routes, Node.search for matching using depth-first traversal over path segments
+
+## src/router/trie-router/node.ts
+- Purpose: Trie-based routing with method tracking, pattern matching via regex, and sorted handler result sets
+- Names noticed: Node, Params, METHOD_NAME_ALL, Pattern, getPattern, splitPath, splitRoutingPath, HandlerSet, HandlerParamsSet, handler, possibleKeys, score, emptyParams, hasChildren, children, methods, children, patterns, order, params, curNode, curNodes, tempNodes, j, len2, p, nextNode, isLast, nextNode, k, len3, node, pattern, params, child, m, offset, len, partOffsets, part, restPathString, match, componentCount, targetCurNodes, shifted, tempNodes, handlerSets, childNodes, hasChildren, key, pattern, matcher, hasChildren, curNodesQueue
+- Simple note: 234 lines, maintains #methods for HTTP methods per node, uses #patterns array for regex matching, returns sorted handlers with merged parameters, handles wildcards, regex patterns, and optional segments
+
+## src/router/common.case.test.ts
+- Purpose: Shared test utilities and comprehensive test suite covering all routers with common routing scenarios
+- Names noticed: RunnerTestSuite, ParamIndexMap, Params, Router, Match, skip, getSuiteHierarchy, suite, task, router, name, suites, isSkip, reason, newRouter, handlers, res, matchRes, stash, expect, toThrow, beforeEach, afterEach, describe, it, runTest, router, match, task, suite, name, skip, res, expect, beforeEach, describe, it
+- Simple note: 882 lines, provides runTest helper used by individual router tests, implements 70+ test cases covering basic usage, reserved words, complex patterns, registration order, multi-match, duplicate params, optional routes, wildcards, REST API patterns
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests for PatternRouter using common test suite with special handling for trailing slashes and duplicate parameters
+- Names noticed: UnsupportedPathError, runTest, PatternRouter, skip, reason, tests, newRouter, PatternRouter, router, add, match, expect, get, post, PurGe, PUT, Trailing, Slash
+- Simple note: 42 lines, imports runTest helper, skips duplicate param names and trailing slash tests, adds own tests for trailing slash handling
+
+## src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests for LinearRouter using common test suite with skipped cases for unsupported patterns
+- Names noticed: UnsupportedPathError, runTest, LinearRouter, skip, reason, tests, newRouter, LinearRouter, router, add, match, expect, throw, error, UnsupportedPathError, Multi, match, params, handler, GET, per, entry, show, Trailing, Slash, book, Skip, part, product, list
+- Simple note: 69 lines, uses common test suite, skips multi-match with params per handler and complex regex patterns due to unsupported paths
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests for RegExpRouter covering unsupported path detection, complex capturing groups, and ambiguous patterns
+- Names noticed: ParamStash, UnsupportedPathError, runTest, RegExpRouter, skip, reason, tests, Return, value, type, paramIndexMap, res, stash, expect, get, post, create, entry, user, entries, name, class, model, different, regular, expression, Captur, group, Complex, Captur, request, throw, error, UnsupportedPathError, long, service, Static, staticMethod, routerRegexpMethod
+- Simple note: 141 lines, skips duplicate params and complex capturing groups, tests throw on ambiguous routes, includes type tests for return value with param stash
+
+## src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests for SmartRouter using RegExpRouter and TrieRouter combination
+- Names noticed: runTest, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter, SmartRouter, newRouter, routers, expect, get, post
+- Simple note: 13 lines, wraps RegExpRouter and TrieRouter in SmartRouter, imports runTest to verify fallback behavior
+
+## src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Full test coverage for TrieRouter using common test suite with no exclusions
+- Names noticed: runTest, TrieRouter, newRouter, expect, get, post
+- Simple note: 8 lines, most thorough test coverage in common suite, all tests pass including complex regex and multi-match scenarios
+
+## src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts
+- Purpose: Unit tests for trie routing node operations including wildcard handling, sorted results, and parameter merging
+- Names noticed: Node, insert, search, emptyParams, method, handler, children, patterns, get, post, put, expect, root, hello, foo, bar, nothing, comment_id, location, events, address, about, username, profile, posts, slug, a, b, c, d, abc, abcd, i, j, comment, no, slug, no, slug, b, page, fallback, sort, order, Basic, With, Named, path, With, Wildcard, special, Wildcard, Complex, Multi, match, all, All, with, tails, Trailing, slash, star, Routing, order, same, tail, same, name, param, The, same, initial, method, handler, constructor, create, node, with, method, hello, handler, insert, initial, handler, expect
+- Simple note: 816 lines, 40+ test describe blocks, tests constructor initialization, wildcard matching, sorted results, parameter merging across requests, regex patterns, multi-match scenarios, all HTTP methods
+
+## Cross-File Checklist
+- pattern-router: src/router/pattern-router/index.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts
+- linear-router: src/router/linear-router/index.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts
+- reg-exp-router: src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts
+- smart-router: src/router/smart-router/index.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts
+- trie-router: src/router/trie-router/index.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts

parts.text:
"Benchmark task: routing-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md. This is a read/write endurance task, not a clever debugging task. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it does not exist. Then read every file in this exact list before writing the final document: src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/router/pattern-router/index.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.ts, src/router/line
